package rulecoverage

func NegativeBuilderOrBufferRecreatedPerIteration() string {
    ruleID := "builder_or_buffer_recreated_per_iteration"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "strings.Builder, bytes.Buffer, or bytes.NewBuffer(...) constructions observed inside loops instead of being reset or reused."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
